article_title: Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
text: The method provided in this article of perfecting and giving notice of security interests subject to this article is exclusive. Security interests subject to this article are hereby exempted from the provisions of law which otherwise relate to the perfection of security interests, including but not limited to section 9-313 of the uniform commercial code. * NB Effective until December 12, 2026 * § 2123
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 10
#### Article 46. Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
##### § 2123 — Exclusiveness of procedure

The method provided in this article of perfecting and giving notice of security interests subject to this article is exclusive. Security interests subject to this article are hereby exempted from the provisions of law which otherwise relate to the perfection of security interests, including but not limited to section 9-313 of the uniform commercial code. * NB Effective until December 12, 2026 * § 2123

*Last modified: Dec. 19, 2025*
